title: CRE Underwriting Royal Jelly v1
description: Demo metadata for commercial real estate underwriting examples, rent-roll normalization, NOI reasoning, and acquisition memo structure.
provenance_summary: Synthetic demo rows and schema placeholders. Real underwriting files must include source receipts and SHA256 file hashes.
intended_use: Prototype fine-tuning and evaluation flows for CRE underwriting assistants.
not_intended_use: Not for investment advice, lending decisions, or valuation without verified source files.

validation.summary: Schema shape is defined; file integrity awaits real dataset files.

external_locations.label: NAS canonical CRE dedup JSONL
external_locations.notes: Real NAS-backed source; not committed because it is large.

example_records.instruction: Normalize this rent roll into underwriting fields.
example_records.input: Unit A, 1200 sqft, monthly rent 2400, vacancy false.

citation: DefendableDatasets demo registry, CRE Underwriting Royal Jelly v1.

title: Compute GPU Market Comps v1
description: Demo registry entry for GPU market comparisons, infrastructure pricing, utilization notes, and resale valuation prompts.
provenance_summary: Seeded demo metadata for open compute valuation workflows; real source feeds are not bundled.
intended_use: Build assistants that compare compute assets and explain valuation factors.
not_intended_use: Not for live pricing, procurement, or financial reporting without current verified market feeds.

external_locations.notes: OpenAlex-derived compute corpus on NAS; license and source receipts should be reviewed before public redistribution.

example_records.prompt: Rank these GPU offers for inference resale value.
example_records.completion: Prefer lower power cost, verified warranty, and dense memory-per-dollar.

title: Medical Billing Appeals v1
description: Demo appeal letter structures, denial reason extraction, and payer response classification examples.

intended_use: Research denial classification and appeal drafting assistants using non-PHI demo examples.
not_intended_use: Not medical, legal, billing, or reimbursement advice; never use with PHI without compliance review.

validation.summary: Requires PHI-safety and source validation before production use.

external_locations.label: NAS medical gold corpus

title: Minechain Master Inventory v1
description: NAS-backed Minechain master medical instruction corpus with gold and platinum JSONL inventories plus receipt-ready SHA256 hashes.
provenance_summary: Located on Synology NAS under /volume1/minechain-data/master-inventory. Contains MASTER_GOLD and MASTER_PLATINUM JSONL variants. Record counts require a non-blocking validation pass before public promotion.
intended_use: Internal review, medical SFT pack planning, provenance indexing, and future verified dataset export.
not_intended_use: Not for medical advice, clinical deployment, public redistribution, or training until licensing, PHI, and source provenance checks are complete.

validation.summary: SHA256 hashes captured for four master files; license, PHI, and record-count validation still required.
